reason: Changing ownership of all world-writable directories to root globally can unintentionally affect services that rely on specific directory ownership (e.g., web servers, application runtimes). A blanket fix may cause service disruption, so a manual review of each directory is advisable before applying changes.
estimated_impact: filesystems affected; Potential service disruption; Unintended ownership changes for application-specific directories; Possible impact on containerized environments
